name: .env.example baseline
description: Create a starter .env.example documenting common variables for client-side apps.
notes: Use this to seed .env.example when a project is missing one. Trim variables you don't need.

files.content:
# App
VITE_APP_NAME=
VITE_APP_URL=

# Analytics / monitoring (optional)
VITE_SENTRY_DSN=
VITE_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN=

# Auth / data (optional)
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
